ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model correctly identified lossiemouth (ranked 1st with 40.0% predicted probability). Strong analytical framework.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Lossiemouth > The New Lion, but actual result was Lossiemouth > Brighterdaysahead. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Lossiemouth had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 3.6%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
